bloatware_guide.Microsoft.YourPhone: Windows Link. Synchronizes phone notifications. Safe to banish; will not destabilize OS.
bloatware_guide.Microsoft.GamingApp: Xbox App Core framework. Essential for Xbox Game Pass. Banishment breaks cloud saves.
bloatware_guide.Clipchamp.Clipchamp: Built-in video editor. Pure bloatware. Safe to purge.
bloatware_guide.Microsoft.BingNews: Live news feed integration. Heavy background RAM consumer. Safe to purge.
